description: MOVE truncation — PIC X(8) value 'ABCDEFGH' moved to PIC X(3) keeps leftmost 3 chars
notes: COBOL alphanumeric MOVE left-justifies and truncates on the right. Moving 'ABCDEFGH' (8 chars) to PIC X(3) stores 'ABC' — the leftmost 3 characters. Engine handles this via CobolDecimal.store() which truncates/pads alphanumeric fields to their PIC length.
